title: Former UN Ambassador Bolton Concerned About Iran Regime Change
description: Former US Ambassador to the UN John Bolton agrees with the objectives of the US, Israeli strikes on Iran but has concerns about the regime change in Iran. He speaks on "Bloomberg This Weekend." (Source: Bloomberg)
content: Former US Ambassador to the UN John Bolton agrees with the objectives of the US, Israeli strikes on Iran but has concerns about the regime change in Iran. He speaks on "Bloomberg This Weekend." (Source: Bloomberg)
